    "R1.1": "Names the load-bearing concept (unified reliability coefficient) and shows where the draft drifts from it by pointing out that the proposed method is not genuinely novel but rather a consolidation of existing methods.",

    "RX.1": "Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (novelty of the contribution).",
    "RX.3": "Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.",
    "RX.5": "Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not."

rationale.R1.1: Names the load-bearing concept (unified reliability coefficient) and shows where the draft drifts from it by pointing out that the proposed method is not genuinely novel but rather a consolidation of existing methods.
rationale.R1.4: Maps against the nearest 3-5 works; identifies sharp vs rhetorical delta.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims (novelty of the contribution).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).
rationale.RX.4: No regressions; identifies harmful patterns in the original.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites are traced; minor edits are not.
